nasb.text: May their table before them become a snare; And when they are in peace, may it become a trap.

esv.text: Let their own table before them become a snare; and when they are at peace, let it become a trap.

cnv.text: 願他們的筵席在他們面前變為網羅、 報應和陷阱。

ccb.text: 愿他们面前的宴席变为网罗， 成为他们的陷阱。

csbs.text: 愿他们的筵席在他们面前成为网罗， 在他们平安的时候成为陷阱。
